hero.title: Control inventory, orders, and payments without making your business more complicated.
hero.subtitle: Entreprenly connects WhatsApp sales, in-store service, and stock validation so you can work with more order, less waste, and more confidence from day one.
hero.waMsg1: Hi, I need 2 kg of oranges and 1 bag of apples.
hero.waMsg2: Stock verified. Order ready to confirm.
hero.financeCopy: Separate cash and digital payments to close the day with fewer doubts.
video.title: See Entreprenly in action.
video.copy: Watch a short explanation of how the platform helps organize orders, inventory, and cash flow in a simple workflow for small businesses.
team.title: Meet the team
team.copy: Meet the team building Entreprenly and the vision behind the platform.
problem.title: Your business does not lose only by selling less. It also loses by operating blind.
problem.copy: Between notebooks, memory, WhatsApp, and cash closing, small daily errors end up costing time, products, and trust.
pain1.title: Chat orders and in-store sales do not talk to each other.
pain1.copy: When each channel is handled separately, stock stops being a reliable source for selling with confidence.
pain2.title: Inventory depends on eyesight, notebooks, or memory.
pain2.copy: That slows operations down and makes mismatches appear right when you need clarity most.
pain3.title: Cash, digital payments, and vouchers get mixed without a clear view.
pain3.copy: Closing becomes heavy, reconciliation takes longer, and errors stay hidden until the end of the shift.
features.title: Four key pieces to organize an operation that is currently scattered.
features.copy: The landing page explains the product value without feeling like a dashboard: clear technology, simple visuals, and concrete benefits for non-technical merchants.
feature1.title: WhatsApp orders
feature1.copy: Organize the channel your customers use most without depending on a phone all day.
feature2.title: Real-time inventory
feature2.copy: Check updated availability to sell with better judgment and replenish before stockouts.
feature3.title: Subscription and billing
feature3.copy: Manage your plan and payments from one place, with a clear view of what you pay each month.
feature4.title: Financial control and reconciliation
feature4.copy: Separate cash and electronic payments to close the day with a clearer, more organized view.
steps.title: Adoption designed for businesses that do not have time for complicated systems.
step1.title: Organize your base
step1.copy: Register products and key operating points in a guided flow.
step2.title: Connect your channels
step2.copy: WhatsApp and the store stop working separately and start sharing context.
step3.title: Manage your subscription
step3.copy: Activate your plan and keep billing organized without extra steps.
step4.title: Collect with more control
step4.copy: Income is organized better and end-of-day closing becomes clearer.
benefits.title: Fewer errors. Less waste. More control.
benefits.copy: Entreprenly is designed for micro-businesses that need operational order without added friction or heavy learning.
benefit1.title: Fewer manual errors
benefit1.copy: Less dependence on loose notes, memory, or late reviews.
benefit2.title: Less loss from perishables
benefit2.copy: Greater visibility to detect shortages, excess rotation, or waste.
benefit3.title: More daily control
benefit3.copy: A clearer view of inventory, orders, and payments from the same ecosystem.
benefit4.title: Faster operations
benefit4.copy: Faster decisions to sell, respond, replenish, and close cash.
benefits.summaryCopy: A quick view of what merchants gain when they work with a more organized operation.
benefits.li2: Agile flows to sell, replenish, and collect.
benefits.li3: More visible stock to avoid shortages and waste.
trust.title: If stock is real, buying by chat also becomes more reliable.
trust.copy: The merchant gains operational order, while the customer also gets faster responses, less uncertainty, and clearer confirmations.
trust1.title: Validated stock
trust1.copy: Less risk of promising products that are no longer available.
trust2.title: Confirmed payments
trust2.copy: More clarity for purchases made through digital payment methods.
trust3.title: Faster service
trust3.copy: A better-organized conversational flow improves how customers perceive the business.
compare.title: Entreprenly is not trying to look like an ERP. It focuses on solving the real work of small commerce.
compare.copy: The difference is not only digitizing tasks, but connecting orders, stock, and cash flow with logic grounded in the business rhythm.
cmp1.manual: Handled through chats and loose notes.
cmp1.generic: They do not always stay inside the same flow.
cmp1.entreprenly: They connect with order, stock, and tracking.
cmp2.manual: Depends on visual counts and late checks.
cmp2.generic: There is a digital record, but no continuous physical validation.
cmp3.manual: Creates repeated errors and a lot of rework.
cmp3.generic: Often feels heavy for small teams.
cmp3.entreprenly: Prioritizes a simple, visual, and clear operation.
cmp4.manual: Work happens reactively after the problem has already occurred.
cmp4.generic: Usually broad, but not grounded enough for small commerce.
cmp4.entreprenly: Focuses on perishables, rotation, orders, and daily cash flow.
plans.title: Start free and scale when your operation needs more control.
plans.copy: Free Plan organizes basic inventory, while Control Plan integrates sales, orders, cash flow, and traceability in one workflow.
plans.annualNote: The annual plan lowers the monthly cost with a 12-month commitment and month-to-month billing.
planFree.name: Free Plan
planFree.title: Basic inventory to start at no cost
planFree.description: For businesses that want to leave the notebook behind and organize the essentials before digitizing sales and orders.
planFree.item1: Up to 40 products and 20 active batches.
planFree.item3: Basic product, batch, search, and inventory alert management.
planFree.item4: Manual stock lookup and simple web control.
planFree.item5: No WhatsApp chatbot or advanced automations.
planControl.name: Control Plan
planControl.title: Everything needed to operate with more order every day
planControl.description: Unify inventory, sales, orders, and cash flow in one workflow for businesses that already need more control.
planControl.noteAnnual: Annual commitment, billed month to month
planControl.item2: Up to 5 users with dashboard access and simple roles.
planControl.item3: WhatsApp chatbot for catalog, orders, and stock validation.
planControl.item4: Sales module with daily cash summary by payment method.
planControl.item5: Operational alerts, traceability, and more complete reports.
faq.title: Common questions before taking the next step.
faq.copy: The landing page answers basic questions quickly, without overloading a non-specialist user with technical details.
faq1.q: Do I need to know technology to use Entreprenly?
faq1.a: No. The product is designed for merchants who need a simple, clear tool they can apply from day one.
faq2.q: Can I start without integrating everything from the beginning?
faq2.a: Yes. The commercial structure proposes staged adoption so the business can move at its own pace and need.
faq3.q: Can I change or cancel my subscription at any time?
faq3.a: Yes. You can adjust or cancel your plan whenever you need, with no long-term lock-in.
faq4.q: Does it help if I already sell through WhatsApp every day?
faq4.a: That is exactly where much of the value is: organizing that channel, reducing errors, and connecting it better with daily operations.
cta.title: Make your business sell with more order and less uncertainty.
cta.copy: Entreprenly is designed to help you control what matters without making your operation harder to manage.
footer.tagline: Smart retail for small businesses that need to organize inventory, orders, and cash flow without adding operational complexity.
footer.copyright: Entreprenly by Kauflink. All rights reserved.
footer.designed: Designed for small businesses that need more control and less friction.
